flashcards.definition: A function defined by different formulas on different intervals of its domain.
A point where the defining formula changes; check one-sided limits here.
At each boundary, verify left limit = right limit = function value.
Set parameters (like a, b) so pieces connect: left limit = right limit.
Absolute value |x| = {x, x≥0; −x, x<0} is a classic piecewise function.
